title: Make display names robust to whitespace and casing
prompt: Update src/formatName.ts so formatName trims surrounding whitespace, collapses internal whitespace, and title-cases each word. Keep the exported function name unchanged.

referenceSolution.src/formatName.ts:
export function formatName(input: string): string {
  return input
    .trim()
    .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
    .split(" ")
    .filter(Boolean)
    .map((word) => word[0]!.toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase())
    .join(" ")
}
